_comment: Unova (BW + B2W2 combined) Overheard lines. Best-effort gen-5 flavor; verified:false until QA'd (CURATION_TODO.md). `who` = real in-game class/name; sprite references Spr_BW_* / Spr_B2W2_* trainer classes (build-content nulls any that didn't scrape).

nuvema-town.text: The Professor's lab is right here. She studies where Pokémon come from — the big questions!

accumula-town.text: Did you catch that speech in the plaza? 'Liberate your Pokémon,' they said. Gave me chills.

striaton-city.text: The three brothers run both the restaurant AND the Gym. Which one you battle depends on your starter!

nacrene-city.text: The Gym's inside a museum, and the whole city used to be a warehouse district. Very artsy now.

castelia-city.text: Biggest city in Unova! Skyscrapers everywhere, and the best ice cream you'll ever have.

nimbasa-city.text: Roller coasters, a ferris wheel, two stadiums — this is the entertainment city!

driftveil-city.text: It's a rough-and-ready market town by the drawbridge. The Cold Storage is just outside.

mistralton-city.text: Cargo planes take off from the runway here. The Gym's in an airplane hangar — full of cannons!

icirrus-city.text: It snows most of the year here. Careful in the marsh outside — the fog gets thick.

opelucid-city.text: The Dragon-type Gym is here. The whole city looks different depending on which version you're in!

aspertia-city.text: There's a lookout up on the hill with the best view in Unova. The new Gym's right here, too.

virbank-city.text: Smoggy little harbor town. The Gym's in a nightclub — the Pokéstar Studios are next door.

humilau-city.text: A resort city built on the water! Everyone gets around by Surfing between the boardwalks.

lacunosa-town.text: Everyone locks their doors at night here. Old legend about a beast that came from the sky…

undella-town.text: Summer resort town! A famous Champion keeps a villa here and visits every season.

lentimas-town.text: Tiny town on the mountainside. The volcano and the old strange house loom right over us.

floccesy-town.text: Quiet farming town. My grandpa runs the ranch just up Route 20 — go say hi!

anville-town.text: The trains all come here for repairs. On weekends collectors show up hunting for rare items.

dreamyard.text: Kids play in these ruins now, but the Musharna here can pull dreams right out of the air.

wellspring-cave.text: The tunnel runs deeper than anyone's mapped. You hear water everywhere but can't see it.

pinwheel-forest.text: Two ways through: the straight path, or the deep woods full of big old trees and bugs.

castelia-sewers.text: Watch your step down here — grunts in funny outfits have been skulking around the tunnels.

desert-resort.text: A whole desert in the middle of Unova! The sandstorm hides old ruins near the center.

relic-castle.text: This buried castle sinks down through the sand. Deeper than anyone's ever gone, they say.

cold-storage.text: A refrigerated warehouse full of crates — and the Pokémon that snuck in from the cold.

chargestone-cave.text: The floating stones are all charged with electricity! They move when you push through them.

mistralton-cave.text: There's a guidance chamber deep inside where one of the guardian dragons is said to rest.

celestial-tower.text: Ring the bell at the top for the Pokémon laid to rest here. Its tone tells you their spirit.

twist-mountain.text: The tunnels twist and climb every which way. Miners and Hikers both get lost in here.

dragonspiral-tower.text: Oldest structure in Unova. They say the original dragon slept coiled inside for centuries.

relic-passage.text: This long underground passage connects the city to the desert ruins. Watch for lurking grunts.

giant-chasm.text: A crater blasted out of the forest. It's bitterly cold at the bottom — and something powerful lives there.

reversal-mountain.text: One side blazing, the other freezing — the whole mountain's split in two climates.

abundant-shrine.text: People come to this shrine to wish for their Pokémon's health. The little ones gather here.

lostlorn-forest.text: A traveling battle troupe camps in this little wood. And rare Pokémon slip in from far away.

moor-of-icirrus.text: The whole marsh floods in the wet season. Great fishing — if you don't mind sinking in the mud!

cave-of-being.text: Three little guardians of the lakes were born in a place like this, the old stories say.

clay-tunnel.text: The Gym Leader had this tunnel dug himself. It runs clear under the city to the old ruins.

seaside-cave.text: The tide pools freeze the floor into slides. Push the ice blocks to make your way across.

strange-house.text: The furniture moves on its own and the stairs don't go where they should. I'm not staying the night!

p2-laboratory.text: An abandoned lab out on the water. Whatever they were building here, they left in a hurry.

ns-castle.text: The whole castle erupted up out of the ground beneath the League. Nobody saw it coming.

liberty-garden.text: There's a lighthouse on this little island. A rare event Pokémon was sighted here once!

floccesy-ranch.text: The ranch dog — er, Herdier — keeps the whole herd in line. One of ours went missing today, though.

virbank-complex.text: Overgrown lots behind the factories. Wild Pokémon and tough Trainers both love the tall grass here.

challengers-cave.text: Only strong Trainers bother with this cave. That's exactly why I train in here!

unova-pokemon-league.text: The League sits at the top of Victory Road. Beat the Elite Four and the Champion waits beyond.

unova-route-1.text: First route out of Nuvema. Just tall grass and little Patrat as far as the eye can see.

unova-route-2.text: Straight shot north to the science city. Plenty of Trainers itching to battle along the way.

unova-route-3.text: There's a school bus stuck on this road and a little pond off to the side. Preschoolers everywhere!

unova-route-4.text: Half-finished buildings and blowing sand — this road runs right alongside the big city.

unova-route-5.text: Street performers line the road into the amusement city. Somebody's always looking for a battle.

unova-route-6.text: It follows the river up toward the cave. The rangers here keep an eye on the wild Deerling.

unova-route-7.text: A long ridge road with an old house at the end. They say it's haunted — I believe it.

unova-route-8.text: The road runs on a boardwalk over the marsh. Mud everywhere off the path — stay on the planks!

unova-route-9.text: There's a whole shopping mall built right on this route! Best place to stock up before the League road.

unova-route-10.text: Last road before Victory Road. The League checkpoint turns back anyone missing a badge.

unova-route-11.text: A bridge road east of the dragon city. Big bug Pokémon love the trees along the rails.

unova-route-12.text: The road runs down to the sea, past a little wood. Feels like the far edge of the region out here.

unova-route-13.text: A coastal cliff road with a hidden hermit's house tucked into the rocks below.

unova-route-14.text: The road winds down to a quiet beach and a wishing shrine in the trees. Peaceful spot.

unova-route-15.text: There's an abandoned resort just off the road here. Strong Trainers gather in its ruined rooms.

unova-route-16.text: Short green road on the edge of the big city. The forest troupe used to camp nearby.

unova-route-17.text: It's all whitewater rapids out here! You ride the current down on a raft — hold on tight!

unova-route-18.text: A rocky little island route at the mouth of the rapids. A rare event Pokémon turned up here once.

unova-route-19.text: First route out of the new town in the southwest. Wild Pokémon in every patch of grass!

unova-route-20.text: The road to the ranch, split by a little river. Lots of families out for a stroll.

unova-route-21.text: You can only reach this stretch by Surfing. Quiet water, big fish, and not another soul around.

unova-route-22.text: A short road running up toward the harbor town. The nightclub's thumping bass carries all the way out here.

unova-route-23.text: The final road before the League checkpoint. Only the toughest Trainers linger up here.

unova-victory-road.text: The last road to the League winds up through the cliffs. Only Trainers with eight badges may climb.

driftveil-drawbridge.text: The longest drawbridge in Unova! When it lifts for the ships, feathers drift down onto the deck.

marine-tube.text: A glass tunnel right along the sea floor! You can watch the water Pokémon swim overhead.

skyarrow-bridge.text: Longest bridge in the region — it soars from the forest gate straight into the big city.

tubeline-bridge.text: Trains rumble underneath while we walk across the top. Bikers love bombing down this one.

village-bridge.text: Folks actually live in little shops built right on the bridge! Someone's always singing out here.

undella-bay.text: Best diving in Unova! Divers hunt for treasure on the seabed all summer long.
